description_long: This is a robust, rectangular military-style storage box with a dark green, weathered exterior, featuring reinforced edges and metal strapping for added durability. The box has visible wear and scuff marks, suggesting frequent use or exposure to harsh environments. Two prominent latches secure the front, while thick rope handles are mounted on each short end for easy carrying. The surface is matte and slightly rough, with a utilitarian, industrial appearance. The box appears to be constructed primarily from metal, possibly steel, with some wooden or composite elements for reinforcement. Its size and rugged build make it suitable for storing tools, equipment, or supplies in urban garages, workshops, or outdoor settings.
description: A rugged, dark green military-style storage box with reinforced edges, metal strapping, and rope handles on each end. The surface is weathered and matte, indicating heavy-duty use.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large securing latches and reinforced metal strapping across the top and sides.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a thick rope handle and visible edge wear, with no latches present.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front but without latches, showing the reinforced structure and strapping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with another rope handle, mirroring the other end.
